<!--
Thanks for contributing to ARN-Skin. Please fill in the sections below.
The CI will run automatically — see the "Checks" tab once the PR is open.
-->

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Color change (one or more keys)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Internal cleanup / refactor
- [ ] Other:

## Related issue

Closes #<issue number>

## Screenshots (required for any visual change)

For colour or UI changes, include before / after screenshots showing every
modified surface.

### Before
<!-- Drag and drop your before screenshot here -->

### After
<!-- Drag and drop your after screenshot here -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes locally (from `test/`)
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` passes locally (from `test/`)
- [ ] If I touched `extension.js`, I added or updated the relevant tests
- [ ] If I touched a theme JSON, the cross-theme structural tests still pass
- [ ] If this is a colour change, before / after screenshots are attached

## Pre-flight

- [ ] The PR is focused on a single concern (no drive-by refactors).
- [ ] The description explains *why* the change is needed.
- [ ] No `TODO` / `FIXME` markers were introduced.
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/jzbakh/antigravity-arn-skin/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
      and followed the code style.
